import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    PYRAMID = 5
    SQUARE = 4
    YELLOW = 5
    GREEN = 2

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)])

    def find_object(grid, tile_id, color_id):
        mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == tile_id) & (grid[:, :, 1] == color_id)
        count = jnp.sum(mask).astype(jnp.float32)
        y = jnp.sum(yy * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        x = jnp.sum(xx * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        return y, x, count

    # Current state
    pyr_y_s, pyr_x_s, pyr_cnt_s = find_object(state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_s, sq_x_s, sq_cnt_s = find_object(state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    ay_s = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_s = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_s = (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    # Next state
    pyr_y_n, pyr_x_n, pyr_cnt_n = find_object(next_state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_n, sq_x_n, sq_cnt_n = find_object(next_state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    ay_n = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_n = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_n = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    hs = holding_s.astype(jnp.float32)
    hn = holding_n.astype(jnp.float32)

    just_picked = (~holding_s) & holding_n
    just_placed = holding_s & (~holding_n)

    pyr_on_grid_n = pyr_cnt_n > 0.5
    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W)

    # ===== SUCCESS =====
    dist_pyr_sq_n = jnp.abs(pyr_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_n - sq_x_n)
    dist_pyr_sq_s = jnp.abs(pyr_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_s - sq_x_s)

    success = pyr_on_grid_n & (~holding_n) & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)
    r_success = success.astype(jnp.float32) * 10.0

    # ===== PHASE 1: Not holding → move toward pyramid =====
    dist_agent_pyr_s = jnp.abs(ay_s - pyr_y_s) + jnp.abs(ax_s - pyr_x_s)
    dist_agent_pyr_n = jnp.abs(ay_n - pyr_y_n) + jnp.abs(ax_n - pyr_x_n)

    phase1 = (1.0 - hs) * (1.0 - hn)
    r_phase1 = phase1 * (dist_agent_pyr_s - dist_agent_pyr_n) / max_dist * 2.0

    # ===== PICKUP BONUS =====
    r_pickup = just_picked.astype(jnp.float32) * 2.0

    # ===== PHASE 2: Holding → position front cell adjacent to square =====
    # Key insight: pyramid is placed in front of agent.
    # We want the FRONT CELL to be adjacent (dist=1) to the square.
    # So we want dist(front_cell, square) == 1
    # Equivalently dist(front_cell, square) to be minimized toward 1.

    # Front cell in current state
    dir_s = state.agent.direction
    dy_s = DIRECTIONS[dir_s, 0].astype(jnp.float32)
    dx_s = DIRECTIONS[dir_s, 1].astype(jnp.float32)
    front_y_s = ay_s + dy_s
    front_x_s = ax_s + dx_s
    dist_front_sq_s = jnp.abs(front_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(front_x_s - sq_x_s)

    # Front cell in next state
    dir_n = next_state.agent.direction
    dy_n = DIRECTIONS[dir_n, 0].astype(jnp.float32)
    dx_n = DIRECTIONS[dir_n, 1].astype(jnp.float32)
    front_y_n = ay_n + dy_n
    front_x_n = ax_n + dx_n
    dist_front_sq_n = jnp.abs(front_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(front_x_n - sq_x_n)

    # Reward: front cell getting closer to being adjacent to square
    # Target: dist_front_sq == 1
    # We want to minimize |dist_front_sq - 1|
    target_dist = 1.0
    front_error_s = jnp.abs(dist_front_sq_s - target_dist)
    front_error_n = jnp.abs(dist_front_sq_n - target_dist)

    phase2 = hs * hn
    r_phase2 = phase2 * (front_error_s - front_error_n) / max_dist * 3.0

    # Bonus: front cell is exactly adjacent to square while holding (ready to place)
    front_adjacent = hn * (dist_front_sq_n >= 0.5).astype(jnp.float32) * (dist_front_sq_n <= 1.5).astype(jnp.float32)
    r_ready = front_adjacent * 0.5

    # ===== PUTDOWN REWARD =====
    r_putdown = jax.lax.select(
        just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5),
        jnp.float32(8.0),
        jax.lax.select(
            just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n,
            jnp.float32(-0.5),
            jnp.float32(0.0)
        )
    )

    # ===== SMALL ABSOLUTE SHAPING =====
    # When not holding: small signal for being close to pyramid
    r_abs_pyr = (1.0 - hn) * (max_dist - dist_agent_pyr_n) / max_dist * 0.2
    # When holding: small signal for front cell being close to adjacency
    r_abs_front = hn * jnp.maximum(0.0, max_dist - front_error_n) / max_dist * 0.3

    total = (
        r_phase1
        + r_pickup
        + r_phase2
        + r_ready
        + r_putdown
        + r_success
        + r_abs_pyr
        + r_abs_front
    )

    return total.astype(jnp.float32)
